items.example: The director won an award for his latest film.
The script was written by a famous screenwriter.
The film has an all-star cast.
Avengers is one of the biggest blockbusters of all time.
The soundtrack was composed by Hans Zimmer.
My favourite scene is the car chase.
She played the role of a detective.
He went to an audition for a TV commercial.
The premiere will take place next Friday.
The film got mixed reviews from critics.
